title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 06 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 06 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 06 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/09/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.12% today, the main contract closed at 853.5. The traders' willingness to ship is high.The steel mills are active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is more.PBF at Shandong port deal 915-917 yuan/mt,increase 5-7 yuan/ mt.
